D:\a_computer\Game_gw\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a
D:\a_computer\Game_gw\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\main.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\a_computer\Game_gw\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\main.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmain.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\main.dir\linkLibs.rsp
